reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: This school just takes money it won’t utilise it properly it skips chapters and waste time making sure students don’t develop any skill or other creativity especially Cambridge wing they don’t follow Cambridge pattern but take lot of fees

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: If you have capacity to teach your kid at home, arrange and afford your own extra curricular activities, tution then go for this school. You r responsible for u r kids studies, behaviour. This school will never own up anything and will make parents responsible for low scores in academics. They want preprogramed robots who listen to pre fixed instructions and follow not kids with natural behaviours. Section run from "A to Z stuffed with 40 each students in a section" . Dont fall for the 1st day orientation, u will regret for a lifetime. If u have strong communication, argument and questioning capabilities then u can make a try and i bet u will excel in above 3 by the time u r kid passes out of this school. Parents and students are always treated as 3rd grade refugees. The infrastructure is just a myth and for display only and for use. They project everything very big and I promise it will take just 2 years for you to realise and experience. I found no teacher  in last 10 years who have patience to handle a kid, they just pass on everything on to parents or u will be asked to visit "VP Madam". If u r kid have natural ebilities of quick learning, self deciplane,  high grasping power then only try this school. It's a school with massive and diversified crowds (students) which school have no capability and capacity to monitor, control and coach. Bus drivers are enough to teach u r kid those filthy hyderabadi fowl words. If u want to own up or be responsible for your kids academics and results then opt this school. Its literally 10 years of punishment for my kid, my wife and me. I will post this in all platforms openly with my name as soon as I get my kids final marks memo and TC . I wish Malka Komarayya see this review and involve in the school in person

reviews.author: bindu
reviews.review_body: Early year timings start from 8 am. If ur kid cannot get up early then dont opt for this school for early years. May be in primary years u can try. Quality of education and other activities everything else i feel is just above average. Not Very great also

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Day by day school is becoming worst…Only money lovers …Day by day der r pressuring us something or the other ..2 days over school reopens…2 days back der called us n said school bus transport is mandatory…..Wen OT transport persons went n fight der told ok u can come but u should park out of the gate n campus is so big how kids can walk from main gate to campus wid der luggage of 8 to 9 kg..Now der changed the timing of pick up of Ot kids 3.30 der did by the time kids reach home it will be 5…Now der daily calling us to opt school bus. Daily der forcing us n wat is d school time mrng 8 to evening 3 … If ur OT parents it wil be 3.30 …Before admission dis rule was nt der….

reviews.author: SGX
reviews.review_body:
Please avoid DPS Nacharam.Here is the first hand experience with my kid at this school( 2024/2025)

School is very crowded. Your kid will learn to be a part of crowd.

If you are not a teacher here, your kid is less likely to get selected for any co - curricular activity as selections and awards are highly biased.

Bus Transport is pathetic. The pick up/drop time is often changed. Tracking doesn't work often. bus kids are made to wait for 20 min extra than own transport kids. Long route buses are often merged to save money for school. The problem worsens during exams. During admission they promise quick bus routes to your location.

School does not plan school calendar. If both parents are working then this school is definitely not for you. Holidays are announced often a day before and sometimes even late in night for next day.

Last but not the least, I found the overall environment very insensitive for kids. The school culture is like let the enrolled kids suffer, they anyways have so many other new kids waiting to take admission.

When it comes to CBSE curriculum, all the homework/project is sent home and parents are expected to do it with kids. Chapters are skipped. Question/Answers are written on board and kids are asked to copy it before the chapter is explained. If time is left then teacher takes efforts of explaining the chapter. Suddenly you would get a WhatsApp at 9 pm in night , get X, Y, Z things tomorrow for an activity next day that carries 10 marks.

reviews.author: Parveen sharma
reviews.review_body:
My son , from 1st 'O' Shivansh really enjoyed n was very happy when came from the school . These activities are very motivating and encouraging for kids .
Thank you DPS for arranging these activities.
Regards

reviews.author: Gracy Nirmala
reviews.review_body: My child was very excited to go to school with a colorful dress and even to carry same color snacks, to spend a playful day in school without books, Very good initiative idea by DPS

reviews.author: Rajesh Langade
reviews.review_body:
Wonderful Independence Day celebration@DPS Nacharam.
Students performance was impressive

reviews.author: Sahithi Yerram
reviews.review_body:
This is Srinath. My Son is in 2H at DPS Nacharam -

I am impressed with the quality of education and the supportive environment at DPS Nacharam. The teachers are not only knowledgeable but also deeply committed to give an opportunity in the passion the students pursue. In the recently held independence day celebrations, my son is given an opportunity to be part of junior club wherein he played keyboard and got a wide appreciation. Thanks DPS Nacharam.

reviews.author: Niketa Shreekhande
reviews.review_body: Wonderful presentation done by students. Really appreciate the efforts put up by the students. Hats off to the teachers for their consistent support which helped students to rock the stage. Really a very successful Indepence day celebration.
